title: StcBeat
description: One authored Save-the-Cat beat — fills one of 15 canonical beat slots per design/save-the-cat-sketch-01.md S1/S2. `slot` is bounded at 1..15 matching NUM_CANONICAL_BEATS in the Python prototype; `page_actual` is the author-placed page target (interpreted proportionally for non-screenplay encodings per S2). Per save-the-cat-sketch-02 S11, `participant_ids` optionally names characters present in the beat. The `advances` array carries strand_advancement sub-records (inline $defs per PFS7-X2).

strand_advancement.description: One strand this beat advances. Binding-only record (no authorial id); ships inline per PFS7-X2. Each beat may advance A, B, both, or neither.

strand_id.description: Plain-string reference to a sibling StcStrand per PFS7-X1. Resolution audit is PFS7 OQ4. PFS7-BT4.

note.description: Optional authorial commentary on what the advance accomplishes for this strand. Python default empty string; schema admits unconditionally. PFS7-BT4.

id.description: Stable identifier for this beat (e.g., 'B_01_opening'). No prefix convention enforced. PFS7-BT2.

slot.description: Which of Save-the-Cat's 15 canonical beat slots this beat fills (1=Opening Image ... 15=Final Image). Bounded range matches NUM_CANONICAL_BEATS in save_the_cat.py; Python StcBeat.__post_init__ enforces the same range at construction. Multiple beats may share a slot (S1 admits; verifier surfaces as noted). PFS7-BT2.

page_actual.description: Author-placed page target. Interpreted literally on 110-page screenplays; proportionally for other forms (S2). No bound at the schema layer — encodings map to novels / plays / prose at authored page counts. Monotonicity across slot order is a verifier check, not a schema check. PFS7-BT2.

description_of_change.description: Optional author prose describing what this beat does in the encoding's terms. Python default empty string. PFS7-BT3.

advances.description: Optional array of strand-advancement sub-records per PFS7-BT4. Inline $defs per PFS7-X2 (StrandAdvancement has no authorial id and appears only here). Python default empty tuple → empty array.

participant_ids.description: Optional array of plain-string references to StcCharacter ids (PFS7-X1). Characters present in this beat per save-the-cat-sketch-02 S11. Empty array legal (some beats describe environmental or collective moments without a named roster). PFS7-BT5.

page_tolerance_before.description: S14-SE1 (save-the-cat-sketch-03). Optional hard positional lower-tolerance for page_actual relative to the canonical page_target for this slot. 0 (default) means no before-tolerance active. S16.1 enforces non-negative (second line of defense for Python-level negative values that bypass the schema) and, when active together with page_tolerance_after, checks that page_actual falls within [canonical_page_target - page_tolerance_before, canonical_page_target + page_tolerance_after]. Compiler stage-1 extracts to per-beat positional preconditions. PFS-15-8.

page_tolerance_after.description: S14-SE1 (save-the-cat-sketch-03). Optional hard positional upper-tolerance for page_actual relative to the canonical page_target for this slot. 0 (default) means no after-tolerance active. Companion field to page_tolerance_before; S16.1 enforces non-negative and positional-window inclusion when active. PFS-15-9.

emphasis_preference.description: S15-SP3 (save-the-cat-sketch-03 / DCS1 side 2). Soft per-beat emphasis preference for stage-4 ranker scoring (beats tagged `expanded` or `centerpiece` receive disproportionate prose real-estate; `minimal` is compressed). Empty string (default) is neutral. Canonical-plus-open: published canonical vocabulary {minimal, standard, expanded, centerpiece}; non-canonical strings are admissible (the ranker handles unrecognized values as default-neutral). Per DCS3 there is NO verifier coverage for S15 fields — schema accepts any string. Open-string posture matches Aristotelian pacing_preference (PFS-N11) and STC role_labels (PFS7-CH4). PFS-15-10.

authored_by.description: Optional provenance string. Python default 'author'. PFS7-BT.
